top_tweets.text: I am in awe of how bad windows 11 is. It is impressive Microsoft managed to fuck up this much. Stop firing all of your talented Q&A people and vibe coding your operating system. You cannot AI your way to a good product.
top_tweets.author: AndrewPerpetua
top_tweets.name: Andrew Perpetua
top_tweets.summary_zh: 批評 Windows 11 品質極差，指出微軟不該裁掉優秀的 QA 人員並用「vibing」方式開發作業系統，也無法靠 AI 彌補產品缺陷。這呼應了許多產品團隊面臨的質量與人力取捨問題。

top_tweets.text: Engineering will become progressively more alien-looking in the era of computer-generated design
top_tweets.author: beffjezos
top_tweets.name: Beff (e/acc)
top_tweets.summary_zh: 預測在電腦生成設計的時代，工程產物的外觀將越來越「異形化」，暗示 AI 設計工具將帶來全新的美學範式。

top_tweets.text: At some point, we stopped color coding things. It's few extra bits of information that we stopped encoding in the visual language of design. https://t.co/E0FvesrWzk
top_tweets.author: usgraphics
top_tweets.name: U.S. Graphics Company
top_tweets.summary_zh: 指出設計界逐漸放棄用色彩編碼來傳遞資訊，這些額外的視覺訊息位元已不再被納入設計語言中。

top_tweets.text: A Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE) is a customer-facing software engineer who embeds directly within a client's environment to customize, deploy, and troubleshoot complex software, often in AI or data-heavy sectors. They act as a bridge between a company’s product team and the
top_tweets.author: HelloVyom
top_tweets.name: VG🌪️
top_tweets.summary_zh: 解釋 Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE) 的角色：深入客戶環境、客製化部署並排除複雜軟體問題的客戶面向工程師，是產品團隊與客戶之間的橋樑，常見於 AI 或數據密集領域。

top_tweets.text:
I heard from a reliable source that Google is about to join the harness wars. 

The design doc is almost ready, alignment meetings are underway, back in founder mode baby
top_tweets.author: redtachyon
top_tweets.name: Ariel
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 Google 即將加入「harness wars」，設計文件快完成、對齊會議進行中，重回創辦人模式——隱喻大公司內部冗長的產品流程。

top_tweets.text:
Much of the design of my new site was made around rabbit holes. 

To start with the surface of something simple, say a skull, then slip between (and into) each artwork, collection, person, psalm, their contributions, and how each piece fits together. 

https://t.co/uiiSGfFQ17 https://t.co/DmheKEfPGP

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
